message:
fix: PEP 440 version parsing for large dev numbers and legacy format

- Use u64 for dev/post numbers to support timestamps (e.g., 202510250044)
- Support legacy "-N" format for post releases (e.g., 1.0-1 = 1.0.post1)

requests now resolves successfully: 6232 packages
First run: 64s, cached: 9.4s

files.patch:
@@ -1078,4 +1078,5 @@ kernels = metal0.load("kernels.zig")
 
 to allow manual memory control
 
-!IMPORTANT! always go for the proper fix, Say NO to simpler approach that is not a proper fix.
\ No newline at end of file
+!IMPORTANT! always go for the proper fix, Say NO to simpler approach that is not a proper fix.
+!IMPORTANT! fix memory leaks immediately!
\ No newline at end of file
